mapper.update:
update cmp_check_stock set check_bill_status = #{status}
id = #{id} and ytenant_id = #{yTenantId}
mapper.delete:
delete from cmp_checkmanage
id = #{id} and ytenant_id = #{yTenantId}

delete from cmp_checkmanage_detail
mainid = #{mainid} and ytenant_id = #{yTenantId}
mapper.select: select cmp_checkmanage.* from cmp_checkmanage join cmp_checkmanage_detail on cmp_checkmanage.id = cmp_checkmanage_detail.mainid where cmp_checkmanage_detail.checkid = #{checkId} order by cmp_checkmanage_detail.pubts desc limit 1
